prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a cheerful young Japanese woman wearing a cute sailor-style school-uniform-inspired dress. She has warm medium brown short bob hair with wispy bangs, clear fair skin, large brown eyes, and a gentle smile. She stands centered on a bright modern Japanese shopping street in daytime, leaning slightly toward the camera and making a peace sign beside her face with her left hand while her right hand lightly holds the edge of her skirt. Her outfit is a navy one-piece sailor dress with short puff sleeves, a white sailor collar with navy stripe details, a large cream bow at the chest, a fitted waist, a flared skirt, and a cream layered ruffle hem; add dark knee-high socks barely visible at the bottom. Use a natural full-body-to-thigh portrait crop, camera slightly above waist height, shallow depth of field, soft natural sunlight, realistic skin texture, crisp focus on the subject, blurred pedestrians and storefronts in the background, urban street perspective receding behind her, clean fashion-photo composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people in focus.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a cheerful young Japanese woman wearing a cute sailor-style school-uniform-inspired dress. She has warm medium brown short bob hair with wispy bangs, clear fair skin, large brown eyes, and a gentle smile. She stands centered on a bright modern Japanese shopping street in daytime, leaning slightly toward the camera and making a peace sign beside her face with her left hand while her right hand lightly holds the edge of her skirt. Her outfit is a navy one-piece sailor dress with short puff sleeves, a white sailor collar with navy stripe details, a large cream bow at the chest, a fitted waist, a flared skirt, and a cream layered ruffle hem; add dark knee-high socks barely visible at the bottom. Use a natural full-body-to-thigh portrait crop, camera slightly above waist height, shallow depth of field, soft natural sunlight, realistic skin texture, crisp focus on the subject, blurred pedestrians and storefronts in the background, urban street perspective receding behind her, clean fashion-photo composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people in focus.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的竖构图街拍人像，画面中是一位穿着可爱水手风校服裙的开朗日本年轻女性。她留着 暖中棕色 的短波波头，配有空气刘海，皮肤白皙透亮，有着大大的棕色眼睛和温柔的笑容。她站在白天明亮的现代日本商业街中心，身体微微向镜头倾斜，左手在脸旁比出剪刀手，右手轻轻提起裙摆。她的装扮是一件海军蓝连体水手裙，带有短泡泡袖、饰有海军蓝条纹细节的白色水手领、胸前系着大大的奶油色蝴蝶结，收腰设计，裙摆呈伞状，下摆有奶油色层叠荷叶边；裙底隐约可见深色过膝袜。采用自然的全身至大腿人像构图，相机略高于腰部，浅景深，柔和的自然光，真实的皮肤纹理，主体焦点清晰，背景中的行人和店面虚化，城市街道透视向后延伸，干净的时尚摄影构图，无文字，无水印，焦点内无其他多余人物。
